visual_attributes.morphology: primitive, hairy giant with horns on his head
visual_attributes.size_and_scale: gigantic, grows ten feet taller each day
visual_attributes.structural_arrangement: standing between heaven and earth, pushing the sky upwards

domain_specific_visual.COSMIC_EGG: emerged from a cosmic egg symbolizing Taiji
domain_specific_visual.HOLY_BEASTS: often depicted with Turtle, Qilin, Phoenix, and Dragon

domain_specific_functional.SYMBOLIZES_TAIJI: represents the balance of yin and yang
domain_specific_functional.CREATION_OF_LIFE: body transforms into all forms of life

relationships.description: Assisted by Turtle, Qilin, Phoenix, and Dragon in creation tasks
Union with Jade Maiden gave birth to Emperor of the East
Union with Jade Maiden gave birth to Empress of the West

symbolic_items: Jade Terrace of the Mysterious City

contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: Represents the creation of the world and balance of cosmic forces
